sections.html: This course has a dedicated Discord server for collaboration, peer support, and community. Participation is entirely optional — no course content or grading depends on it. Before joining, you must read and understand the following terms.

left.label: What Discord Is For
items: ✓ Networking with current students and alumni

right.label: What Discord Is NOT For
items: ✗ Anything that belongs in an email

sections.label: ⚠️ Platform Disclaimer
paragraphs: This Discord server is not operated, managed, or monitored by The University of Texas at San Antonio. It is a third-party platform subject to Discord’s own Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, not UTSA’s data protection policies.
UTSA cannot guarantee the security, privacy, or availability of any content shared on this server. Your participation is entirely voluntary and at your own discretion.

rules.title: Protect Your Privacy.
rules.body: Use a nickname or first name only. Do not share your student ID, full name, phone number, address, or other personally identifiable information.

rules.title: Keep Academic Records Off Discord.
rules.body: Do not post screenshots of grades, Canvas notifications, or instructor feedback. These conversations happen in email or office hours.

rules.title: Ask in Channels, Not DMs.
rules.body: Questions asked publicly help everyone. Minimize direct messages — if you have a question, others probably do too.

rules.title: Be Respectful — Zero Tolerance for Toxicity.
rules.body: This is a professional learning community, not a complaint forum. Treat your instructor, TAs, classmates, and alumni with respect at all times.
subitems: No personal attacks, insults, harassment, or bullying of any kind
No passive-aggressive comments, sarcasm directed at individuals, or hostile tone
No public venting about grades, deadlines, or course policies — take it to email
No @mentioning the instructor to demand responses or escalate complaints
Disagreements happen; handle them like a professional or walk away
rules.warning: If you create a hostile environment for others, you will be removed immediately and permanently. There is no warning for this.

rules.title: No Academic Integrity Violations.
rules.body: Helping each other learn is encouraged. Sharing quiz answers, copying lab work, or completing assignments for others is not.

sections.label: Enforcement:
sections.html: Minor rule violations may receive a warning. Toxic, hostile, or disrespectful behavior results in immediate permanent removal without warning. Harassment, threats, or academic integrity violations will also be reported to UTSA Student Conduct. This server is a privilege, not a right — it exists because students before you built a helpful community. Don’t ruin it.

sections.heading: By Clicking the Link Below, You Acknowledge:
items: You have read and understand the terms on this page
Participation is voluntary and not required for any grade
The server is not a UTSA system and is not subject to university data protections
You are responsible for protecting your own privacy
warningItems: You agree to maintain a respectful, professional tone at all times
You understand that toxic behavior results in immediate permanent removal
You agree to follow all server rules or accept removal

sections.html: After joining, introduce yourself in #introductions — we’re glad to have you!
